projects.title: PSNP Capacity Development Evaluation
projects.description: Evaluated PSNP IV capacity development investments using mixed methods and PSM across 9 regions.

projects.title: MSC Assessment
projects.description: Operational research on multisectoral nutrition coordination mechanisms assessing bottlenecks across government levels.

projects.title: ENJOY Project Baseline
projects.description: Baseline for a youth employment project providing data to inform progress against project logic indicators.

projects.title: Africa RISING Literature Review
projects.description: Reviewed and synthesized literature for six potential research articles on sustainable intensification and livestock-crop integration.

projects.title: Integrated Urban PSNP Baseline
projects.description: Socio-economic baseline of urban PSNP households using household, health facility, and community surveys.

projects.title: Behavioral Insight Study – Waste Segregation
projects.description: Studied residential solid waste segregation behavior using Kobo Toolbox and designed an insights report.

projects.title: Food Environment Analysis (FEA)
projects.description: Nationwide exploratory research profiling the food environment using ESS/LSMS-ISA data and qualitative fieldwork.

projects.title: Skill Gap Assessment
projects.description: Assessed TVET college trainers and managers, recommending qualifications and occupations against regional benchmarks.

projects.title: GIC Baseline & Progress Surveys
projects.description: Tracked performance indicators for wheat, legume, and honey value chains across multiple survey rounds.

projects.title: AYEW Youth Aspirations Survey
projects.description: Explored youth aspirations and resilience pre/during/post-COVID-19 with nationally distributed fieldwork.

projects.title: WTP Study – Abaya-Chamo Watershed
projects.description: Identified WTP of ecosystem service users and established a PES scheme for Nech Sar National Park.

projects.title: KfW Evaluation
projects.description: Performance evaluation of KfW investments in higher education and TVET using quantitative and qualitative methods.

projects.title: Poverty Reduction & Economic Growth 2001–2021
projects.description: Analyzed the nexus among poverty, inequality, and growth using panel datasets and economy-wide CGE modelling.

projects.title: Energy Efficiency, Innovation & Productivity
projects.description: Studied firm-level energy efficiency, innovation, and productivity of female-owned businesses across East and West Africa.

projects.title: ENTRO Flood Forecast & Early Warning
projects.description: Forecasted flooding patterns and assessed early warning systems using bathymetry, satellite imagery, and community surveys.

projects.title: EMERTA Project Terminal Evaluation
projects.description: Measured impact of agribusiness and gemstone value chain project using PSM and produced a Power BI dashboard.

projects.title: Ethio Legal Shield
projects.description: Developed business concepts, financial modeling, and bankable proposals for a legal services startup.

projects.title: Mobility in a Changing Climate
projects.description: Researched human mobility and climate change interlinkages in secondary cities and designed a capacity-building toolbox.

projects.title: Speed School Tracer Study
projects.description: Impact evaluation of alternative education for climate- and conflict-affected children using Propensity Score Matching.

projects.title: Business KPIs Aggregation
projects.description: Generated comparable performance KPIs for European businesses using Principal Component Analysis.

projects.title: Input-Output Multipliers for Excel
projects.description: Prepared Excel simulation models for static and dynamic IO models for the Saudi Arabian economy.

projects.title: CBT & DIF Methodology Terminal Evaluation
projects.description: Impact evaluation of community-based training and disability inclusion facilitators on governance and food security.

projects.title: ACRFSE RCT Evaluation Design
projects.description: Co-designed RCT for climate-resilient food systems with 10,000 soybean, teff, and maize farmers.

projects.title: Family MUAC Pilot Study Endline
projects.description: Cluster RCT evaluating caregiver training on acute malnutrition detection and cost-effectiveness across three arms.

projects.title: Menstrual Health Study
projects.description: Comprehensive demand and supply-side analysis of menstrual health products using collective bargaining and conjoint analysis.

projects.title: Multidimensional Poverty Assessment
projects.description: Assessed multidimensional poverty across health, education, housing, infrastructure, food security, and MPI indicators.

projects.title: AYPReS – Africa Youth Aspirations & Resilience Survey
projects.description: Nationally representative survey generating robust evidence on youth aspirations, resilience, and livelihoods for ages 15–35.
